# SupaLite

> SupaLite is a lightweight TypeScript PostgreSQL client with a Supabase-style query builder. It keeps the familiar `.from().select().eq()` API but connects directly to Postgres, giving you query builder, RPC, and transactions with less overhead than the supabase-js REST client. MIT licensed; install with `npm install supalite`.

## Key facts

- **Faster than supabase-js for queries.** supabase-js goes through the REST/PostgREST HTTP layer; SupaLite connects directly to Postgres. Same-machine benchmark (identical query, 300 iterations): SupaLite p50 ~0.24 ms vs supabase-js ~1.0 ms — about 4× lower — same tier as Drizzle and Prisma. Cloud deployments add network hops on top.
- **Concurrency-safe transactions** via `client.transaction(async (tx) => { ... })`. The Supabase client does not support transactions.
- **JSON-safe 64-bit BIGINT.** `bigintTransform` defaults to `'number-or-string'`: a number when within JS safe-integer range, a string when not — precise and JSON-serializable. supabase-js loses precision (returns a JSON number); Prisma and Drizzle return a BigInt that throws on `JSON.stringify`.
- **Scope:** query builder + RPC + transactions. It does NOT provide auth, storage, or realtime — use supabase-js or dedicated services for those.
- **Type generation:** `supalite gen types` produces TypeScript types, with byte-for-byte Supabase CLI-compatible output on demand.
- Works with any PostgreSQL database. Requires Node.js >= 16.17.

## When to use SupaLite

- You want a thin, SQL-close query layer with Supabase ergonomics.
- You are migrating off Supabase and want to keep the query syntax.
- You need transactions or JSON-safe bigints that supabase-js doesn't give you.
- Prefer Prisma or Drizzle instead if you want schema-first modeling and built-in migrations.

## Links

- [README (full API and usage)](https://github.com/genideas-labs/supalite#readme)
- [Korean README](https://github.com/genideas-labs/supalite/blob/main/README.ko.md)
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/supalite)
- [Benchmarks (reproducible latency + bigint tests)](https://github.com/genideas-labs/supalite/tree/main/benchmarks)
- [Homepage](https://genideas-labs.github.io/supalite/)

## Install

```
npm install supalite
```
